name: MStack
description: MStack — agentic GTM, Growth, and Product. 8 plugins / 176+ skills / 43+ chained slash commands. Built by Mothi Venkatesh (PMM at Cashfree Payments) to codify the structured 80% of GTM/Growth/Product work as installable agents. Install the full stack or the one plugin you need this week.

plugins.name: opb-curriculum
plugins.description: 22-lesson operator curriculum: 26 core skills + 7 chained slash commands + 4 templates. Engineering → productizing → distribution → monetization → leverage, calibrated for solo operators shipping agent-powered products in 2026. Start here if you're still building intuition.

plugins.name: gtm-analytics
plugins.description: 40 enterprise-grade GTM analytics skills across Marketing, Sales, RevOps, CX, and Systems & Data. For when you scale past $1M ARR and need real revenue-ops discipline. Attribution, deal-rot, propensity-to-renew, churn risk, multi-touch attribution, golden-path journey, sales rep effectiveness.

plugins.name: gtm-ops
plugins.description: GTM operating system for AI-first sales orgs. 11 skills running the 3-loop model (Acquisition · Nurture · Re-engagement) on Salesforce + n8n + Claude. Includes agents, SQL, dashboards, evals, and the full operating spec.

plugins.name: ai-sdr
plugins.description: Autonomous AI SDR running inside Claude Code. Router + 7 modes (research, validate, outreach, follow-up, batch, analytics). Score-gated pipelines, TSV staging, three-tier fallback, hardcoded NEVER/ALWAYS rails. Replaces a 25-node n8n workflow.

plugins.name: devrel-playbook
plugins.description: 27 community-building skills + applied case studies + a synthetic developer ICP dataset. Super-fans, ambassador programs, decentralized communities, certification, IKEA effect, creator flywheel, champions, dogfooding, master end-to-end growth playbook.

plugins.name: pmm-ops
plugins.description: SuperPMM — AI-powered GTM Builder for Product Marketers. One guided workflow with 5 steps (Research → CI → PRFAQ → Positioning → GTM Plan) producing a complete ICP, competitive analysis, PRFAQ, positioning, and launch plan in ~60 minutes.

plugins.name: product-ops
plugins.description: Product ops harness: a 6-stage execution SOP for small teams plus 65 PM skills + 36 chained slash commands across discovery, strategy, execution, market research, GTM, marketing/growth, data analytics, and toolkit. Combines the Scrut-tested SOP with phuryn/pm-skills (MIT, Pawel Huryn).

plugins.name: funnel-marketing
plugins.description: Two skills for funnel marketing & conversion copy: (1) funnel-builder reverse-engineers a competitor's launch & distribution strategy in 4 phases (Discovery → Timeline → Funnel Mapping → Synthesis), grounded in 45,056 real Reddit conversations across 20 funnel subreddits with raw JSON data bundled; (2) psychology-triggers applies 218 psychological sales/marketing triggers to copy, landing pages, ad copy, sales scripts, and pitch decks.
